top_findings.title: Standings and team/aggregate stats double-count matches for overlapping 2012-2019 seasons
top_findings.evidence: src/query-engine.ts:379-384 getStandings() sums BOTH store.brasileirao and store.historical for the same season; Brasileirao_Matches.csv (2012-2022) and novo_campeonato_brasileiro.csv (2003-2019) overlap on seasons 2012-2019 (verified via csv DictReader). queryMatches() (src/query-engine.ts:168-211) also emits each physical match twice because the dedup key at :231 includes the competition label ('Brasileirão Serie A' vs 'Brasileirão (Historical)'), so getTeamStats/getLeagueStats/getTopScoringTeams/getBiggestWins all double-count 2012-2019. Tests pass anyway because assertions are inequalities (e.g. index.test.ts:181 wins>10).
top_findings.suggestion: Dedup overlapping sources by (normalized teams, date, score) before aggregating, or pick one Brasileirão source per season range so standings/stats are computed once.
